evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: It's a very simple tool. You can drill down JSON interactively by using filtering queries like [jq](https://stedolan.github.io/jq/).

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: **Suggestion**, **Auto completion**, and **JMESPath** support provide a comfortable JSON exploration experience.

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: Interactively navigate JSON using dot-path queries. Tab-complete fields, cycle through candidates, and see the matching key highlighted in the JSON view in real time.

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: Use pipes, wildcards, and built-in functions directly in the filter. Function candidates are shown with usage hints and argument templates are filled in automatically.
